seo.title: Chalean Extreme Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Supercharge your metabolism and get results with Chalean Extreme. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: High-energy Chalene turns her lifelong love of health and fitness into exciting, challenging workouts that scorch calories and burn fat. Her results-driven programs inspire people to reach for hardcore results without straining their bodies. When you’re ready to sweat, Chalene is ready for you.

data.descriptionShort: Get ready to burn fat, boost your metabolism, and get lean with Chalean.
data.descriptionLong: Chalene teaches you how to burn fat with resistance training instead of cardio. When you build lean muscle, you supercharge your metabolism so you burn fat long after your workout—even while you sleep.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells or Resistance Bands, Stability Ball, Resistance Loops*, Weighted Gloves*, Yoga Mat*
modules.categories: Strength, Bootcamp, Cardio, Bodyweight Training, Recovery, Core, Yoga, Weight Loss

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Carey R. lost 33 pounds doing ChaLEAN Extreme!
modules.testimonial: I'm a mother of five and I have abs. I actually have little indents here that I never had before. My clothes fit better than ever.
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort.
